# viettelidc_vks_nfs_server (Data Source)

Data source for VKS NFS Server details.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Quáº£n lÃ½ vÃ  Import NFS Storage
data "viettelidc_vks_nfs_server" "shared_storage" {
  cluster_id = "1477"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_id` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
